design_philosophy.core_loop: 2-on-2 arcade basketball with fast-paced action, dunking, and momentum-based 'on fire' mechanic that rewards consecutive scoring
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Maintaining offensive momentum ('on fire' status) vs. defensive pressure; risk-reward of aggressive play without fouls
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Superhuman basketball dunking and acrobatic play that defies physics; playing with NBA-licensed rosters in exaggerated, high-flying arcade style
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Deliberate rejection of simulation realism: no fouls, free throws, or violations (except goaltending/24-sec); allows free shoving and elbowing. 'On fire' mechanic creates explosive momentum shifts. Easter eggs and hidden characters (Bill Clinton, mascots) signal intentional arcade irreverence

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Multiple hidden codes and button combinations unlock secret features (e.g., 'Super Clean Floors' mode affects difficulty by making characters slip at high speeds); extensive Easter eggs suggest adjustable challenge through unlocks

progression.unlock_mechanism: Extensive secret unlocks via button/joystick combinations and character initials; hidden players (Bill Clinton, Hugo the mascot, Stephen Howard); secret tank mini-game accessible via controller inputs
replayability_hooks: Multiple hidden characters and Easter eggs encourage replaying to discover secrets
Tournament Edition adds updated rosters and expanded hidden content
'On fire' momentum mechanic creates variable match dynamics

world_building_techniques: NBA-licensed teams and digitized player likenesses create authenticity layer
Easter eggs (Bill Clinton, Godzilla/Bart Simpson planned-but-scrapped) create cultural conversation hooks

faction_indicators: NBA team rosters (1992-93 season arcade; 1993-94 console versions)
Regional team loyalty through licensed squads
danger_signals: No foul system creates physical aggression norms (free elbowing/shoving)
Exaggerated superhuman capabilities may normalize unrealistic expectations
environmental_storytelling: Digitized player likenesses ground fantasy action in real NBA context
Court environment remains grounded despite exaggerated physics
Arcade cabinet presentation (flyers, button layouts) creates arcade culture identity
